synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23333 Oracle Linux 9 libwacom bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23333
description:
[1.12.1-6]
- Add stylus definitions for the propen group (RHEL-122207)
- Add tablet definitions for the latest Cintiqs (RHEL-122206)
- Fix the overlap for button assignments in the SVG (RHEL-126355)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23333

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23333.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libwacom-1.12.1-6.el9_7.i686.rpm
libwacom-1.12.1-6.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
libwacom-data-1.12.1-6.el9_7.noarch.rpm
libwacom-devel-1.12.1-6.el9_7.i686.rpm
libwacom-devel-1.12.1-6.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libwacom-1.12.1-6.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
libwacom-data-1.12.1-6.el9_7.noarch.rpm
libwacom-devel-1.12.1-6.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/libwacom-1.12.1-6.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.12.1-6]
- Add stylus definitions for the propen group (RHEL-122207)
- Add tablet definitions for the latest Cintiqs (RHEL-122206)
- Fix the overlap for button assignments in the SVG (RHEL-126355)
